name: NANOFORCE tactical surgeon fighter
short_description: Climb into the cockpit of an overpowered micro unit and fight against an invisible enemy that threatens the Human race. Progress through numerous enemy waves and bosses across more than 7 levels filled with action, secrets, and more !
detailed_description:
Welcome to the fascinating world of "NanoForce: Tactical Surgeon Fighter", where the human anatomy becomes the stage for an epic battle for survival, and where every cell counts in the fight against chaos.

In 2089, NanoForce, a sprawling corporation focused on health and humanity's development, sends you on a mission. Humanity is facing extinction due to a mysterious virus that defies the scientific community.
Take control of your "Wicked Nurse" spacecraft and dive into the depths of Jackie Fox's body, patient zero, a skilled pilot of a fallen mercenary group. Your mission: save her life, fend off the threats endangering her, and find the Solaris, a mysterious artifact.

Engage in fierce battles across over 12 different levels against viral infections, bacterial attacks, gigantic bosses, and numerous other dangers. Utilize your piloting skills, over 25 different weapons, and tactical intelligence to protect each cell and organ against enemy assaults.

Traverse the various organ systems of the pilot's body, from the cardiovascular system to the nervous system to the respiratory system, and confront the dangers lurking within.

Immerse yourself in an enchanting soundtrack that harmoniously blends electronic and organic elements, creating an immersive and captivating atmosphere.

Three gameplay modes are available: Arcade, Story, and Green, as well as B-Plan, an alternative version of the Story mode. The story is filled with references to pop culture, cinema, and 80s/90s sci-fi manga. Inspired by classics as thunderforce, gradius, r-type it's a true love letter to shoot them up.

"NanoForce: Tactical Surgeon Fighter" thrusts you into the heart of the action in an immersive adventure where humanity's survival rests in your hands. Are you ready to take on this ultimate challenge and become the hero the world awaits?


This game has been built using SHMUP Creator! A powerful Shoot 'Em Up creation tool. Big up to its creators for their kindness.
